mission.title: Stage 2 - Native examples and release polish
mission.objective: Create and wire a Figthus-native editorial example gallery, refine reference assets, update public docs/prompts, and validate release readiness for issues #7-#11.

acceptance_evidence.description: Figthus-native gallery has 4-6 finished 16:9 editorial illustrations in repo and no longer relies on the model sheet as the public example.
README and examples/prompts show the native gallery and real Figthus usage patterns.
Canonical model sheet/reference state is handled, including “裂开了” pressure wording and repair-state note or asset.
Legacy Xiaohei provenance remains organized and is not marketed as Figthus-native.
Release QA checks pass and issues #7-#11 can close.

tasks.title: Execute Stage 2 gallery and release polish
tasks.mission_contribution: Generate native editorial examples, update documentation and references, verify release readiness, and close Stage 2 issues.
